info.name: School Management API
info.description:
Postman collection for the School Management API built with Node.js, Express.js, and MySQL.

## Setup
1. Import this collection into Postman.
2. Set the `baseUrl` variable to your deployed URL or `http://localhost:3000` for local testing.
3. Run the requests in order: Add schools first, then list them.

variable.description: Base URL of the API. Change to your deployed host URL when testing live.

request.description: Check if the API server is up and running.
